speaker:
THIRD
               
              SENATOR
text: Thou hast painfully discovered. Are his files

speaker:
FOURTH
               
              SENATOR
text: We stand much hazard if they bring not Timon.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: I met a courier, one mine ancient friend,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Whom, though in general part we were opposed,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Yet our old love made a particular force

speaker: MESSENGER
text: And made us speak like friends. This man was riding

speaker: MESSENGER
text: With letters of entreaty which imported

speaker: MESSENGER
text: His fellowship i’ th’ cause against your city,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: In part for his sake moved.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SENATOR
text: No talk of Timon; nothing of him expect.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SENATOR
text: The enemy’s drum is heard, and fearful scouring

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SENATOR
text: Doth choke the air with dust. In, and prepare.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SENATOR
text: Ours is the fall, I fear, our foe’s the snare.
